author: James Clear
quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.

author: Anne Lamott
quote: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.

author: Amelia Earhart
quote: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity.

author: Lao Tzu
quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.

author: Mary Oliver
quote: Keep some room in your heart for the unimaginable.

author: William James
quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.

author: Maya Angelou
quote: Nothing will work unless you do.

author: Seneca
quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.

author: Eleanor Roosevelt
quote: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.

author: Georgia O'Keeffe
quote: I've been absolutely terrified every moment of my life and I've never let it keep me from doing a single thing I wanted to do.

author: Oliver Burkeman
quote: Productivity is not about getting more things done. It's about getting the right things done.
